title: Bruh Mace
description: This is a Minecraft Sound Resource Pack specifically designed to customize the audio for the Mace. Changes Mace's "air smash" and "ground smash" sound effects, providing a more immersive and personalized combat experience.
body:
Overview

The pack focuses on audio immersion by targeting the newer combat mechanics introduced with the Mace. By utilizing the standard Minecraft resource pack architecture, it allows players to swap out default sound effects for custom-engineered audio cues that trigger during specific combat actions.

Key Components

Target Item: The Mace.

Audio Variety: Features a randomized selection of sound files (3 variations for air smashes and 4 for ground impacts) to prevent repetitive audio fatigue.

File Format: Uses the Ogg Vorbis (.ogg) standard, ensuring compatibility with the Minecraft OpenAL sound engine.

Internal Logic: The pack relies on a specific directory tree (assets > minecraft > sounds > item > mace) to correctly map the audio triggers to the player's in-game actions.

Use Case

This pack is ideal for players looking to enhance the "weight" of their attacks or for map makers who want to give unique weapons a distinct, cinematic feel during high-impact landings.
